name: ux_spec
description: Create a UX Specification - user flows, information architecture, screen list, specification of each screen (actions/sections/validation/states), and UX quality criteria for development and testing.
default_prompt: Use $ux_spec when the task matches the "UX Spec" skill.
triggers: Create a UX Specification - user flows, information architecture, screen list, specification of each screen (actions/sections/validation/states), and UX quality criteria for development and testing
